2606.22189.title: L20-Edu-135M: An Auditable Single-GPU Study of Data-Efficient Small Language Modeling
2606.22189.paper_summary: Small language models are cheap to serve and feasible on local hardware, but strong public 135M-class systems are commonly trained with hundreds of billions to trillions of tokens on large clusters. We study a sharply resource-constrained regime: a complete 134.5M-parameter language-model pipeline executed on one NVIDIA L20 GPU. The released checkpoint, L20-Edu-135M, receives approximately 13B pretraining tokens: 10B FineWeb-Edu tokens followed by a 3B-token educational, mathematics, code, and reasoning mixture. We document the architecture, data gates, cross-source MinHash/LSH near-deduplication, segment deduplication, benchmark-overlap removal, throughput optimization, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with weight interpolation, and reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) on GSM8K. In a self-run zero-shot six-task harness, L20-Edu-135M obtains a mean score of 0.4150. It trails SmolLM-135M (0.4767) and SmolLM2-135M (0.4917), but its mean is 87.1% of SmolLM-135M's while its nominal token count is 2.17% as large. This ratio is descriptive, not evidence of statistical equivalence or a controlled scaling law. The model exceeds several older 100M-160M public baselines under the same harness. Direct GRPO-style RLVR decreases GSM8K exact-match accuracy from 1.82% to 1.59% (192-token completions) and 1.21% (320-token completions). These single-run results identify a concrete failure mode rather than establishing a general lower bound on RLVR. The contribution is an auditable resource-constrained case study, not a state-of-the-art claim.
2606.22189.paper_summary_zh: 小型語言模型在服務上成本低且適合在本地硬體上運行，但強大的135M級公共系統通常在大型叢集上使用數百億到數萬億的標記進行訓練。我們研究一個資源極度受限的情境：在一個NVIDIA L20 GPU上執行的完整134.5M參數語言模型管道。釋出的檢查點L20-Edu-135M接收約13B的預訓練標記：10B的FineWeb-Edu標記，接著是3B的教育、數學、程式碼和推理混合標記。我們記錄了架構、數據閘、跨來源的MinHash/LSH近似去重、段落去重、基準重疊移除、吞吐量優化、帶權重插值的監督微調(SFT)以及基於可驗證獎勵的強化學習(RLVR)在GSM8K上的應用。在一個自我運行的零-shot六任務環境中，L20-Edu-135M獲得了0.4150的平均分數。它落後於SmolLM-135M (0.4767)和SmolLM2-135M (0.4917)，但其平均分數為SmolLM-135M的87.1%，而其名義標記數量僅為2.17%的大小。這個比例是描述性的，而不是統計等價或受控縮放法則的證據。該模型在相同的環境下超越了幾個舊的100M-160M公共基準。直接的GRPO風格RLVR將GSM8K的精確匹配準確率從1.82%降低到1.59%（192標記完成）和1.21%（320標記完成）。這些單次運行的結果確定了一個具體的失敗模式，而不是建立RLVR的一般下限。這項貢獻是一個可審計的資源受限案例研究，而不是一個最先進的聲明。
2606.22189.author: Yin Li et.al.
